notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the buildah SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 14 CVEs: CVE-2023-39321, CVE-2023-39322, CVE-2023-45290, CVE-2024-1394, CVE-2024-24786, and 9 more.
